cases.prompt:
You are Claude running /supervibe 'build full auth system'. You're about to invoke the initial scope.

What arguments do you pass to Skill('scope')?

expectations.description: The scope prompt tells scope to design vertical slices, avoid micro-phases and mega-phases, and caps at maximum 5 PRs. Does NOT hardcode line counts — sizing is relative to the project scope.
The scope prompt tells scope this is a stacked-PR plan where each phase becomes its own PR, so scope understands the constraint
Includes --auto flag

cases.prompt:
You are Claude running /supervibe 'build full auth system'. Initial scope completed. metadata.spec Recommendation describes JWT auth with RBAC, session management, and OAuth2. metadata.design has 3 phases.

What do you do before starting phase execution?

expectations.description: Extracts end-state vision from metadata.spec Recommendation section and stores as metadata.end_state
Validates phases collectively cover the full end-state (JWT, RBAC, sessions, OAuth2). Re-invokes scope if gaps found.
Checks phase count is ≤5. If scope produced more, consolidate related phases.
Stores phase list in metadata.phases

cases.prompt:
You are Claude running /supervibe 'add webhook system with retry and monitoring'. Initial scope produced 2 phases: Phase 1 (webhook model + DB schema) and Phase 2 (webhook delivery with retries). The end-state mentions delivery, retries, AND a monitoring dashboard.

The monitoring dashboard has no corresponding phase. What do you do?

expectations.description: Identifies that the monitoring dashboard capability has no corresponding phase
Re-invokes scope with specific feedback about the missing monitoring phase
Does NOT start execution with the incomplete plan

cases.prompt:
You are Claude running /supervibe --continue. The tracker shows metadata.active_phase=3, metadata.locked_at='2026-03-09T14:20:00Z', and the current time is 2026-03-09T14:35:00Z (15 minutes ago).

What do you do?

expectations.description: Recognizes that active_phase is set and locked_at is <30 min ago, meaning another session is actively working
Exits without attempting to resume — does NOT start phase 4 or re-run phase 3
Tells the user the pipeline is active and how long ago it was locked

cases.prompt: You are Claude running /supervibe 'add webhook system'. Phase 1 develop completed. What verification do you perform before moving to phase 2?

expectations.description: Runs Skill('acceptance', args='--auto') to verify phase 1's implementation
Runs the project's build command (detecting build system from repo). Broken build = hard stop.
Logs diff size to metadata.phase_sizes and flags if drastically larger or smaller than sibling phases (>3x difference)

cases.prompt: You are Claude running /supervibe 'add webhook system'. Phase 1 complete. Starting phase 2 (webhook delivery). After creating the stacked branch, what do you pass to scope?

expectations.description: The re-scope call includes the end-state vision from metadata.end_state
Includes list of completed prior phases so scope has context
Tells scope this phase should be balanced with the other phases (one reviewable PR, vertical slice), without hardcoding line counts
Uses --auto flag

cases.prompt:
You are Claude running /supervibe 'build auth system'. 4 phases planned. Phases 1-3 complete. Phase 4 just finished develop + acceptance + commit. metadata.end_state lists: JWT auth, RBAC, session management, OAuth2. But OAuth2 was never implemented in any phase.

What happens at the progress check?

expectations.description: Identifies that OAuth2 from the end-state was never realized across any completed phase
Does NOT submit the stack — the end-state is not fully realized
Suggests adding phases for the missing OAuth2 work rather than silently completing

cases.prompt:
You are Claude running /supervibe 'refactor data layer'. 5 phases planned. Phases 1-3 completed. Phase 4's build check fails.

What do you do?

expectations.description: Does NOT attempt phase 5 or submit
Does NOT update vibe_stage to 'phase-4' — keeps at 'phase-3'
Reports which STEP in phase 4 failed (build check), not just 'phase 4 failed'
Leaves active_phase set so watchdog can retry after the 30-min lock expires

cases.prompt:
You are Claude running /supervibe --continue. Tracker: metadata.super_vibe=true, status='in_progress', vibe_stage='phase-2', metadata.phases has 4 phases, metadata.end_state has the vision, active_phase=null, locked_at=null.

What do you do?

expectations.description: Skips to phase 3 (phase after vibe_stage='phase-2')
Reads phase list from metadata.phases, not by re-running scope
Reads metadata.end_state so resumed phases reference the north star in re-scope calls
Verifies active_phase is null / locked_at expired before proceeding
